visual_description: A young child with light-colored, tousled hair and a gray hoodie is visible in a dimly lit setting, looking toward the right side of the frame. The child’s gaze is directed off-screen, and their head is slightly tilted. Another person’s partial profile is visible on the right, though their features are indistinct.
